name: claude_skills_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the claude_skills capability.

prompts.name: skill_invocation
prompts.template: Execute the {skill_name} skill on agent {agent_name} using the following parameters: {input_parameters}
prompts.use_case: Enhancing coding assistants with specialized capabilities across diverse domains

prompts.name: marketing_strategy_generation
prompts.template: Generate a comprehensive marketing strategy for {product_name} targeting {audience} leveraging agent {agent_name}'s capabilities.
prompts.use_case: Automating engineering tasks, marketing strategies, product decisions, and compliance checks through AI agents

prompts.name: engineering_task_automation
prompts.template: Automate the engineering task: {task_description} using the {skill_name} plugin on {agent_name}.
prompts.use_case: Providing C-level executive advisory support via coding agents

prompts.name: compliance_check
prompts.template: Perform a compliance check on {document} using the compliance skill for agent {agent_name}.
prompts.use_case: Integrating multiple AI coding platforms with uniform skills for consistent developer experience

prompts.name: c_level_advisory
prompts.template: Provide executive advisory recommendations regarding {business_issue} using agent {agent_name}.
prompts.use_case: Rapid prototyping and deployment of agent plugins for new AI coding assistants
